name: Beef Broccoli Strudel
recipeIngredient: 1 package frozen chopped broccoli, thawed and squeezed dry
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 10-inch skillet, brown ground beef and onion until the juice evaporates.
2. Remove from heat. Drain fat.
3. Stir in broccoli, cheese, sour cream, bread crumbs, salt, and pepper.
4. Preheat oven to 350°F.
5. On wax paper, place one sheet of Filo and brush with melted margarine. Repeat with all of the Filo dough.
6. Starting at the short side of the Filo, evenly spoon the ground beef mixture to cover half of the rectangle.
7. From the other end, roll into a jelly-roll style.
8. Place the roll, seam-side down on a cookie sheet and brush with the rest of the melted margarine.
9. Bake in the oven at 350°F for 45 minutes until golden.
10. Cool for 15 minutes on the cookie sheet to ease cutting.
